title: lonicera × americana
intro: Lonicera × americana, also known as the American honeysuckle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce fever. The health benefits of Lonicera × americana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the body's natural defenses against illness. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
